leadText: Slash redirects here. For the Ultra Beast codenamed UB Slash in Japanese, see Kartana (Pokémon). Slash (Japanese: きりさく Slash) is a damage-dealing Normal-type move introduced in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Slash deals damage and has an increased critical hit ratio. If used by a Pokémon with Sharpness , its power is increased by 50%. Slash can be used as the second move of a Pokémon Contest combination , with the user gaining 3 bonus appeal points if Scratch or Swords Dance was used in the previous turn. sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad A Normal -type attack. It has a high probability of a critical hit for inflicting double the damage. Stad2 A Normal -type attack. It has a high probability of a critical hit for inflicting double damage. G S C Has a high critical hit ratio. R S E Colo XD Slashes with claws, etc. Has a high critical-hit ratio. FR LG The foe is slashed with claws, etc. It has a high critical-hit ratio. D P Pt HG SS PBR The foe is attacked with a slash of claws, etc. It has a high critical-hit ratio. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP The target is attacked with a slash of claws or blades. Critical hits land more easily. LA The target is attacked with a slash of claws or blades. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit. S V The target is attacked with a slash of claws, scythes, or the like. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit. ZA The user attacks by slashing with claws, scythes, or the like. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] All of the variations of this move involve cutting or slashing . With a total of seven, Slash is learned by more Pokémon upon evolving than any other move. Prior to Generation V , Shedinja is able to know Slash by leveling up if Nincada is allowed to evolve only at level 31, as Ninjask learns this move at this level.
